title: Terminal activation-family direct output
hypothesis: After proving direct terminal-output for standalone terminal Relu vec-op tails, the next bounded activation-family step should test whether a small nonlinear terminal activation family can also write directly to Y_DRAM on fixed nm1, but only after a real Layer 1 activation block has accepted physical implementation results.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Can a bounded nonlinear terminal activation family establish clean nm1 reference points first, then show a direct-output win on those same points without reopening broader ranking?
include: measurement-only non-fused nm1 reference points on a bounded terminal nonlinear activation suite
paired direct-output vs non-fused nm1 comparison on the same bounded suite after local legality and quality checks
exclude: broad architecture sweeps before terminal activation legality and quality are established
broad activation-family claims beyond the chosen first-pass nonlinear family
follow_on_broad_sweep: run broader activation-family or architecture ranking only if the bounded nonlinear activation comparison is positive or mixed enough to justify reintegration

expected_benefit: extends the accepted direct-output mechanism from Relu-only vec-op tails to a more meaningful activation family
forces explicit quality-gate handling for numerically sensitive terminal-op support
reuses the measurement-first and dependency-gated evaluation model so paired export remains valid by construction
risks: the chosen nonlinear activation family may be too numerically sensitive for a first-pass mapper-only proof
the current schedule IR may need extra terminal vec-op metadata beyond the accepted Relu path
quality-gate cost may dominate the first iteration if the family choice is too broad

expected_result.reason: the first requirement is an accepted Layer 1 sigmoid block with measured physical timing, power, and area
the first layer2 item should only run after the Layer 1 sigmoid block has accepted physical metrics and should then record non-fused nm1 reference metrics and legality evidence
if terminal nonlinear activation direct-output lowering is valid, it should reduce the final writeback tail on at least part of the bounded activation suite against the refreshed non-fused baseline
